input:
In the meantime, the Prophet continued to move towards the enemy with those surrounding him. Indeed, he moved dangerously close to them. He was completely exposed to their swords and spears. It may seem strange that the commander of the army should so expose himself. The attitude of the Prophet, however, revealed the strength of his faith. There was absolutely no trace whatsoever of panic on his part. His conviction in the truth of his message and the nature of his role was never shaken.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 36: Grouping for a Final Assault

output.scene_title: The Prophet Faces Danger with Bravery
output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 36: Grouping for a Final Assault

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)
characters.appearance: Early 50s, medium build, dignified upright posture. Wearing a simple white thobe with a green cloak draped over shoulders, white turban with tail between shoulder blades. Simple leather sandals. Always shown in silhouette, face never visible. Distinguished by green cloak and subtle warm light.

characters.name: Sahabi Leader
characters.appearance: Late 40s, medium brown skin, muscular build, taller than average. Thick black beard with slight grey tint, neatly kept. Wearing off-white cotton thobe, plain brown woolen cloak, white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Determined facial expression, standing with arms crossed.

output.moral_lesson: Faith is the source of strength and courage in the face of danger.
output.narrative_text: The Prophet led his men closer to the enemy, despite being exposed to their swords and spears. He showed no signs of fear, proving the strength of his faith.

compliance.notes: The Prophet is shown in silhouette, with no graphic violence or details of the enemy. The scene focuses on the Prophet's bravery and faith.

output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor illustration. A vast open space of the 7th century Madinah desert, with palm trees in the background. A group of older Arab men, dressed in off-white thobes and brown cloaks, are seen in the distance, standing in a line with their backs to the viewer. One of them, slightly taller, has a thick black beard with a few grey hairs, standing with arms crossed. The Prophet is shown in silhouette, facing the enemy, with a green cloak and white turban visible. The sun is setting behind him, casting a warm golden light. The men are shown in a medium shot, from the waist up. A large dust cloud can be seen in the distance, with the enemy's spears and swords visible, but not in detail. Warm golden palette. No modern objects.
